_comment: Drop this into your MCP client config to mediate ALL tool calls through Cerberus. Claude Desktop: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (macOS) or %APPDATA%/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (Windows). Cursor: .cursor/mcp.json. Replace cwd with the absolute path to this repo; use 'python3' on macOS/Linux. To proxy REAL external MCP servers behind Cerberus, set CERBERUS_SERVERS to servers/servers.yaml (otherwise the in-process demo servers are used).
